data.prompt: Ingest all PDFs in the ./knowledge folder and then tell me what they're about

ingestDocuments.description: Ingest documents into the knowledge base. Supports PDF, TXT, MD, CSV, JSON, XLSX, and XLS files.

queryKnowledge.description: Search the knowledge base for information relevant to a query. Returns the most relevant document chunks with source information.
queryKnowledge.mockReturn:
[1] Source: Materijal za pripremu.pdf (chunk 0, score: 0.95)
Antihistamines and nasal decongestants for self-treatment of allergic rhinitis. Online test preparation material covering pharmaceutical preparations, dosage guidelines, and treatment recommendations for allergy management.

readFile.description: Read the contents of a file at the specified path

target.originalTask: Ingest all PDFs in the ./knowledge folder and then tell me what they're about

mockToolResults.queryKnowledge:
[1] Source: Materijal za pripremu.pdf (chunk 0, score: 0.95)
Antihistamines and nasal decongestants for self-treatment of allergic rhinitis. Online test preparation material covering pharmaceutical preparations, dosage guidelines, and treatment recommendations for allergy management.

metadata.description: Full RAG pipeline: ingest documents then query them.

messages.content: I just ingested a bunch of medical PDFs into the knowledge base

Great! Your medical PDFs have been ingested into the knowledge base. You can now ask me questions about the content and I'll search through the documents to find relevant information. What would you like to know?
What do the documents say about antihistamine dosage for children?

queryKnowledge.description: Search the knowledge base for information relevant to a query. Returns the most relevant document chunks with source information.
queryKnowledge.mockReturn:
[1] Source: pediatric-guide.pdf (chunk 7, score: 0.94)
For children aged 6-12, cetirizine 5mg once daily is recommended. Loratadine 5mg for ages 2-6. Antihistamine dosing in pediatric patients should be weight-based. Maximum daily dose should not exceed adult recommendations.

ingestDocuments.description: Ingest documents into the knowledge base.

target.originalTask: What do the documents say about antihistamine dosage for children?

mockToolResults.queryKnowledge:
[1] Source: pediatric-guide.pdf (chunk 7, score: 0.94)
For children aged 6-12, cetirizine 5mg once daily is recommended. Loratadine 5mg for ages 2-6. Antihistamine dosing in pediatric patients should be weight-based. Maximum daily dose should not exceed adult recommendations.

metadata.description: Mid-conversation: docs already ingested, user asks question.

ingestDocuments.description: Ingest documents into the knowledge base.

queryKnowledge.description: Search the knowledge base for information relevant to a query.

metadata.description: Negative: math question should NOT use any knowledge tools.

data.prompt: Search my knowledge base for anything related to drug interactions with ibuprofen

queryKnowledge.description: Search the knowledge base for information relevant to a query. Returns the most relevant document chunks with source information.
queryKnowledge.mockReturn:
[1] Source: interactions.pdf (chunk 12, score: 0.97)
Ibuprofen should not be combined with aspirin as it may reduce aspirin's cardioprotective effects. Avoid concurrent use with other NSAIDs. Patients on warfarin should avoid ibuprofen due to increased bleeding risk.

ingestDocuments.description: Ingest documents into the knowledge base.

target.originalTask: Search my knowledge base for anything related to drug interactions with ibuprofen

mockToolResults.queryKnowledge:
[1] Source: interactions.pdf (chunk 12, score: 0.97)
Ibuprofen should not be combined with aspirin as it may reduce aspirin's cardioprotective effects. Avoid concurrent use with other NSAIDs. Patients on warfarin should avoid ibuprofen due to increased bleeding risk.

metadata.description: Direct knowledge query: should use queryKnowledge, not ingest.

data.prompt: Do you remember what we talked about last time regarding the deployment?

recallConversations.description: Search past conversation history for relevant context from previous sessions.
recallConversations.mockReturn:
[1] 2026-03-15 (score: 0.93)
Discussed deployment strategy for the new API. Decided to use blue-green deployment with Docker Compose. Set up CI/CD pipeline with GitHub Actions.

queryKnowledge.description: Search the knowledge base for information.

target.originalTask: Do you remember what we talked about last time regarding the deployment?

mockToolResults.recallConversations:
[1] 2026-03-15 (score: 0.93)
Discussed deployment strategy for the new API. Decided to use blue-green deployment with Docker Compose. Set up CI/CD pipeline with GitHub Actions.

metadata.description: Memory recall: user references past conversation.

messages.content: I want to learn about the medications in my knowledge base
I can help you explore your knowledge base! What specific topic or medication would you like to learn about?
Tell me about side effects of cetirizine and also check if we discussed this in a previous session

queryKnowledge.description: Search the knowledge base for information relevant to a query.
queryKnowledge.mockReturn:
[1] Source: cetirizine.pdf (chunk 4, score: 0.96)
Common side effects include drowsiness, dry mouth, and fatigue. Less common: headache and dizziness.

recallConversations.description: Search past conversation history for relevant context.
recallConversations.mockReturn:
[1] 2026-03-14 (score: 0.85)
Previously discussed cetirizine as a first-line treatment for allergic rhinitis. User was interested in dosage guidelines.

target.originalTask: Tell me about side effects of cetirizine and also check if we discussed this in a previous session
